articles.title: Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment
articles.description: John Palmer, head of derivatives at Kraken, said he expects sophisticated traders to lead adoption of newly approved U.S. perpetual futures, with broader institutional participation likely to follow over time.

articles.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
articles.description: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

articles.title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
articles.description: "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote on X, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.

articles.title: Crypto should adopt the best of centralization, says LMAX CEO
articles.description: As digital assets mature the industry should borrow more from traditional market infrastructure, especially credit, clearing and collateral systems, David Mercer argues.

articles.title: Morpho's $175M raise shows where crypto VC money is flowing
articles.description: Morpho’s recent $175 million raise reflects growing investor bets on onchain credit infrastructure as stablecoin adoption expands.

articles.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
articles.description: The XRPL AI Starter Kit gives developers tools for agent payments, but early x402 activity has clustered on Base and Solana. Ripple’s bet is that XRPL’s speed, low fees and RLUSD can win a piece of that flow.

articles.title: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
articles.description: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

articles.title: 馬斯克身價可比七個黃仁勳！SpaceX 世紀掛牌引爆資金大洗牌，恐終結美股七雄霸局

articles.title: Top cryptographers can't agree on Bitcoin's biggest quantum question
articles.description: A Coinbase-convened panel says Bitcoin should start preparing for quantum attacks now, but declines to take a position on whether millions of vulnerable coins, including many linked to Satoshi Nakamoto, should eventually be frozen.

articles.title: Anthropic's pre-IPO shares fall as U.S. government shuts down its most powerful AI model
articles.description: A jailbreak report prompted Washington to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from all users. Anthropic complied but pushed back hard, saying the finding sets a standard that would halt the entire AI industry.

articles.title: Hyundai Motor 推出波士頓動力 Atlas 擔綱「School of Football」活動，迎接 FIFA World Cup 2026

articles.title: AWS 有望採 AI200！外資看好高通拿下首個大型 ASIC 客戶，上調目標價

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin steadies above $63,000 as its worst week in months got a late macro rescue
articles.description: A tiny Strategy sale raised a bigger question about Saylor’s never-sell stance, while easing Iran fears, and a strong SpaceX debut helped risk assets recover.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO scramble reveals difference between tokenizing a stock and getting one
articles.description: Crypto platforms promised early access to the blockbuster SpaceX IPO through tokenized shares. The problem wasn't technology, but getting the actual stock.

articles.title: 外國人禁用最高階 AI 模型！美商務部出手限制 Anthropic 存取權限

articles.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
articles.description: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

articles.title: ETH futures flash bearish signal, but stakers’ resilience points to underlying strength
articles.description: Demand for ETH leverage remains low, but corporate accumulation and stakers’ dedication may prevent an Ether price crash to $1,500.
